Bash(cd C:/Users/nba_a/GodhartsLaw/snake_cnn && python -c "
from snake_game import SnakeGame, RIGHT
from cnn import HomemadeCNN, DEFAULT_ARCH, ARCH_1CONV, ARCH_DEEP, softmax
from agent import SnakeAgent
import numpy as np

game = SnakeGame\(20\)
state = game.reset\(\)
assert state.shape == \(20, 20, 3\)

adj = game.get_adjacent\(\)
print\('Adjacent:', adj\)

for _ in range\(5\):
    _, r, done = game.step\(RIGHT\)
print\('After 5 steps: score=%d done=%s' % \(game.score, done\)\)

cnn = HomemadeCNN\(\)
logits = cnn.forward\(state\)
assert logits.shape == \(4,\)
probs = softmax\(logits\)
print\('Logits:', logits\)
print\('Probs:', probs, 'sum=%.4f' % probs.sum\(\)\)
print\('Architecture:'\)
for line in cnn.layer_summary\(\):
    print\(' ', line\)

w = cnn.get_weights\(\)
cnn.set_weights\(w\)
logits2 = cnn.forward\(state\)
assert np.allclose\(logits, logits2\)
print\('Weight round-trip OK  \(%d params\)' % len\(w\)\)

agent = SnakeAgent\(\)
action, final_probs, cnn_probs = agent.decide\(game\)
print\('Agent chose action=%d  probs=%s' % \(action, final_probs\)\)

for name, arch in [\('1conv', ARCH_1CONV\), \('deep', ARCH_DEEP\)]:
    a = SnakeAgent\(arch=arch\)
    act, _, _ = a.decide\(game\)
    print\('%s arch: action=%d  params=%d' % \(name, act, len\(a.cnn.get_weights\(\)\)\)\)

print\(\)
print\('All checks passed.'\)
")
